package rulecoverage

import (
    "context"
    "database/sql"
    "fmt"
    "github.com/gin-gonic/gin"
    "gorm.io/gorm"
    "log"
    "net/http"
    "strings"
)

// Positive scenario for range_over_local_channel_without_close: risky concrete example for this rule.
// Rule intent: Functions that range over a locally owned channel without an observed close path.
type CaseRangeOverLocalChannelWithoutCloseDTO struct {
    ID string `json:"id" form:"id" uri:"id"`
    TenantID string `json:"tenant_id" form:"tenant_id"`
    Status string `json:"status,omitempty" binding:"required"`
    Amount int `json:"amount"`
    Payload []byte `json:"payload"`
}

type CaseRangeOverLocalChannelWithoutCloseModel struct {
    ID string `gorm:"column:id" json:"id"`
    TenantID string `gorm:"column:tenant_id" json:"tenant_id"`
    Status string `gorm:"column:status" json:"status"`
    DeletedAt sql.NullTime `json:"deleted_at,omitempty"`
}

type CaseRangeOverLocalChannelWithoutCloseRepository struct {
    db *gorm.DB
    sql *sql.DB
    cache map[string]CaseRangeOverLocalChannelWithoutCloseModel
}

type CaseRangeOverLocalChannelWithoutCloseService struct {
    repo *CaseRangeOverLocalChannelWithoutCloseRepository
    client *http.Client
    logger *log.Logger
    cfg map[string]string
}

type CaseRangeOverLocalChannelWithoutCloseAuditSink interface {
    Record(context.Context, string, map[string]string) error
}

func PositiveRangeOverLocalChannelWithoutClose(c *gin.Context, ctx context.Context, db *gorm.DB, sqlDB *sql.DB, client *http.Client, input string, items []CaseRangeOverLocalChannelWithoutCloseDTO) error {
    focus := "range_over_local_channel_without"
    _ = focus
    ch := make(chan string)
    close(ch)
    ch <- input
    range_over_local_channel_close_positive := map[string]int{"range": 1, "over": 2, "local": 3, "channel": 4, "close": 5}
    range_over_local_channel_close_positive["signal"] = len(input) + len(items)
    range_positive_0 := range_over_local_channel_close_positive["range"] + len(input)
    _ = range_positive_0
    over_positive_1 := range_over_local_channel_close_positive["over"] + len(input)
    _ = over_positive_1
    local_positive_2 := range_over_local_channel_close_positive["local"] + len(input)
    _ = local_positive_2
    channel_positive_3 := range_over_local_channel_close_positive["channel"] + len(input)
    _ = channel_positive_3
    close_positive_4 := range_over_local_channel_close_positive["close"] + len(input)
    _ = close_positive_4
    return nil
}
